title: I Wonder If The Sepulchre
content:
I wonder if the sepulchre
    Is not a lonesome way,
    When men and boys, and larks and June
    Go down the fields to hay!
meaning:
This evocative piece by Emily Elizabeth Dickinson, titled "I Wonder If The Sepulchre", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
